name: Quick Pots De Creme
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk until it reaches a boiling point.
2. In an electric blender, combine all other ingredients except the hot milk.
3. Add the hot milk to the blender and blend on low speed for one minute.
4. Stir with a rubber spatula to remove any bubbles.
5. Pour the mixture into individual pot de creme cups.
6. Chill several hours before serving.
